ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., size 2, size 3) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "dress_length" REAL /* Dress length in cm */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., regular, plus) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for the size (e.g., men, women) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit identifier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is designed */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the brand is based */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Dresses, Tops) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program the customer is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method chosen by the customer */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of this item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal of the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reason for the return */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping method */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated number of days for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size that was changed */,
  "old_bust" REAL /* Old bust measurement */,
  "old_waist" REAL /* Old waist measurement */,
  "old_hips" REAL /* Old hips measurement */,
  "old_dress_length" REAL /* Old dress length */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
